name: AI Surface Smoke Research
description: Run Raul's browser/desktop test workflow: focus Codex and Claude, open Chrome/browser, search Reddit and/or X for AI topics like Claude, OpenClaw, Hermes, summarize signals, and report only after tool-backed execution completes.
triggers: search reddit and x for ai
focus codex and claude then search x
focus codex and claude then search reddit
search reddit and x for claude openclaw hermes

defaultWorkflow: Read this skill and supporting desktop/browser/X playbooks.
Find and focus Codex, then find Claude and prefer exact handles when names collide.
Open Reddit and/or X with the requested AI query and collect 3-5 scroll passes.
Summarize only after tool-backed collection completes.

resources.description: Successful 2026-05-21 lightweight Reddit/OpenClaw AI-surface scan example with tool order, output shape, and steering guardrails.
Successful AI smoke-test example with tool order, Claude name-collision caveat, and output shape from 2026-05-22.
Recovery example for AI smoke tests when browser_scroll_collect fails because the page/context closed during a run.
